view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for booking volume trends is satisfied by the provided evidence.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for booking volume trends is satisfied by the provided evidence.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for booking volume trends as it includes specific data points such as total bookings (342), percentage increase from the previous month (+12%), and other relevant metrics. This data directly supports the need for daily, weekly, monthly, and YoY booking trends, confirming that the requirement is covered. The linked use case provides comprehensive insights into booking performance, which aligns with the expected results of the exploratory step.
